Mo To Compel Responses To Disco
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and requests for production of documents to defendants Walter Dawydiak and Cars Dawydiak Inc. is granted. The motion is not moot as there is no proof that responses have been served. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond in a timely fashion was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $636.30 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
